title: Wynncraft Spell Caster+
description: A spell caster mod with some enhanced features
body:
Spell Caster+ is a macro mod for Wynncraft that allows for simple hotkey binding to cast spells through single clicks.

This mod attempts to prevent miscasting by calculating click cooldowns based on server-sided TPS estimates, allowing accurate high-speed (10 CPS) spell inputs.

Features:
- Dynamic input delay based on server-side lag
- Info HUD to benchmark spell casting and click speed
- Hold hotkeys to repeat spell cast
- Melee click override to prevent melee attacks from causing spells to miscast
- Hold melee to continuously attack with accurate tier delay.

I recommend setting the click delay in the config to -10 ms; this has performed very well in testing. Increase or decrease this value slightly depending on your consistency.

The melee click override feature will cause issues with parasite overtaken in the Nexus of Light raid. Switch your hand to a different slot (not a weapon) and the override feature will disable itself.
